operational_scenes.scene_title: Overview and Explanation of Viva Screens and Bag Out Controls
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain Viva HMI screens focusing on bag out control and AGV status
operational_intents: Introduce Viva screens from Hazlet site
Explain bag out control system and manual bag out cancellation
Discuss AGV status pop-ups and error reporting
Present custom defined metrics requested by UPS
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract detailed operational descriptions and control functions
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Detailed explanation of HMI controls and system functions

operational_scenes.scene_title: System and Tipper Statistics with RMS Integration Discussion
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Discuss system statistics, tipper metrics, and RMS integration challenges
operational_intents: Explain statistics reset per sort and sort GUID usage
Describe historical data handling and database support
Discuss firewall limitations affecting RMS display
Outline future flexibility for historical metrics and HMI integration
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract operational details on statistics management and integration
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focus on system metrics and integration operational aspects
